title: pyrethrum achilleae
intro: Pyrethrum achilleae, also known as Tanacetum parthenium, is a flowering plant in the daisy family. The medicinal properties of Pyrethrum achilleae include its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, relieve headaches, and soothe digestive issues. Pyrethrum achilleae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
